holdings.infoBox: DTCR is an equity ETF with a total of 28 individual holdings. The top holdings are Equinix stock at 12.02%, Digital Realty Trust at 10.48%, American Tower at 9.44%, Crown Castle at 6.78%, and Marvell Technology at 5.73%.

overview.description: The Global X Data Center And Digital Infrastructure ETF (DTCR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in real estate equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of global equities involved in data center REITs and related digital infrastructure companies. DTCR was launched on Oct 27, 2020 and is issued by Global X.
